name: Mirror
description: Generic offline mirror. Point to any private GitHub repo with signed commits. Extension caches and serves content offline with auto-popup.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
